name: Cappuccina Modelina
lore:
Lore of Cappuccina Modelina
                                    


Ballerina Cappuccina is an Italian Brainrot character introduced on the 19th of March, 2025 by TikTok user @aironicfun. She is the wife of Cappuccino Assassino. She can usually be seen dancing or singing. In an older iteration of the meme, she could be seen pirouetting gracefully. She is one of the first Italian brainrots. Her evil conterpart is Ballerina Donutina.
Lyrics
Original (Italian)
Ballerina Cappuccina, mi mi mi mi!
È la moglie di Cappuccino Assassino.
E ama la musica, la la la la!
La sua passione è il Ballerino Lololo.
Translated (English)
Ballerina Cappuccina, mi mi mi mi!
She is the wife of Cappuccino Assassino.
And she loves music, la la la la!
Her passion is Ballerino Lololo.
